name: Cometly
description: Ad attribution platform for DTC/e-commerce with server-side tracking and conversion sync to Meta and Google.

seo.title: Cometly — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Cometly: Ad attribution platform for DTC/e-commerce with server-side tracking and conversion sync to Meta and Google.

when_to_use: Server-side conversion tracking to recover signal lost from iOS ATT
Meta and Google Ads CAPI sync for DTC e-commerce attribution
First-party purchase event tracking bypassing browser-based cookie loss
Attribution reporting for ad campaigns with accurate ROAS calculation

pros: Server-side tracking with Meta and Google conversion APIs
Designed for DTC and e-commerce funnel attribution
cons: Not a mobile app MMP despite the category
Limited channel coverage beyond Meta and Google
Smaller vendor with less operational history
review.verdict: Useful server-side attribution for DTC web brands, but miscategorized as a mobile attribution platform.
review.best_for: DTC Shopify brands syncing first-party conversions back to Meta and Google.
review.not_for: Mobile app developers needing SKAN, install tracking and MMP postbacks.
